ddls:
CREATE TABLE "spectra" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each spectrum */,
  "spec_file" TEXT /* Name of the spec file */,
  "scan_number" INTEGER /* Scan number */,
  "fragmentation_method" TEXT /* Fragmentation method used (e.g., CID, ETD) */,
  "precursor_mass" REAL /* Precursor mass */,
  "mass_error_ppm" REAL /* Mass error in ppm */,
  "charge" INTEGER /* Charge */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date and time of data upload */,
  "instrument_type" TEXT /* Type of mass spectrometer used */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who uploaded the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_spectra_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "peptides" (
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each peptide */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Peptide sequence */,
  "protein" TEXT /* Corresponding protein information */,
  "denovo_score" REAL /* DeNovoScore */,
  "msgf_score" REAL /* MSGFScore */,
  "spec_prob" REAL /* SpecProb */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value */,
  "fdr" REAL /* FDR */,
  "pepfdr" REAL /* PepFDR */,
  "modifications" TEXT /* Post-translational modifications */,
  "peptide_length" INTEGER /* Length of the peptide sequence */,
  "source_organism" TEXT /* Source organism of the peptide */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("peptide_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_peptides_protein FOREIGN KEY ("protein") REFERENCES proteins ("accession")
)

CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "protein_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protein */,
  "accession" TEXT /* Accession number */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol */,
  "tax_id" INTEGER /* Taxonomy ID */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Common name of the protein */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Description of the gene function */,
  "protein_length" INTEGER /* Length of the protein sequence */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protein_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "spectra_peptides" (
  "spec_id" INTEGER /* ID of the spectrum */,
  "peptide_id" INTEGER /* ID of the peptide */,
  "confidence_score" REAL /* Confidence score for the peptide-spectrum match */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("spec_id", "peptide_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "researchers" (
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each researcher */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the researcher */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("researcher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "date_conducted" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was conducted */,
  "researcher_id" INTEGER /* ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_researcher_id FOREIGN KEY ("researcher_id") REFERENCES researchers ("researcher_id")
)
column_names: Date and time of data upload
ID of the researcher who uploaded the data
Confidence score for the peptide-spectrum match
Date when the experiment was conducted
ID of the researcher who conducted the experiment
